summary: Refactored the 'Create debt doc' step out of '/close' and into '/lib' as a new canonical building block '/lib:#Create Debt Document#'. All workflows that previously referenced '/close'_'s _Create debt doc_ step now reference the '/lib' section. The '/lib' section defines the standard debt document format and rules (status always Debt, one doc per finding, self-contained items). This makes debt creation a reusable primitive.
